---
title: "Instrumental_regression"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-02"
---um_matrix <- matric(1:9)
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Fundamentals of Instrumental Variable (IV) Regression

### The IV model and assumptions

### Two Stage Least Square (TSLS) Regression

### General form of IV regression model

```{r library import}
library(AER)
library(plm)
```

```{r data import}
data('CigarettesSW')
summary(CigarettesSW)
```
